items.name_cn:
Vintage Distressed Finish
MIU New Arrival Academic Style Backpack: 5BZ043. Premium distressed lambskin paired with sturdy, wear-resistant linen-blend lining. This leather backpack features a campus-style design, blending exquisite craftsmanship with a casual attitude. Distinctive multi-pocket design highlights MIU's fashionable and playful spirit. Classic leather backpack strap and shoulder strap. A versatile styling essential: pairs with white T-shirt and jeans, khaki trench coat, casual sportswear... endless styles. Fits the universe inside: iPad, folding umbrella, makeup bag. Practical, lightweight, and full of sophistication.
Size: 22X18X11.5cm

items.name_cn:
25P mini Panda🐼 color shoulder bag
The mini shoulder bag fits my aesthetic perfectly. Made of lambskin with a quilted design. Features a small front pocket with no unnecessary details. Despite its small size, it fits a phone, lipstick, compact, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
size:22*18*10cm99473

items.name_cn:
🌟New Small Backpack
This nylon backpack is part of Prada's classic design, embodying the brand's key traits: innovative materials, luxurious practicality, and a reinterpretation of classics. Crafted from Re-Nylon regenerated nylon derived from purified ocean plastic, it balances a modern look with a minimalist design, showcasing a stylish and elegant charm while remaining lightweight and practical.
Size: 23.5x28x12cm
Style: 1BZ677 Silver Buckle

items.name_cn:
🌟Parachute Nylon Backpack
P's most classic, bestselling, and versatile backpack. Lightweight, rain-resistant, and with moderate capacity, it offers effortless styling for travel. Imported parachute fabric - waterproof and sun-proof. Front enamel logo with cross-grain calfskin trim. Drawstring inner pocket + two front zipper pockets. Meets the needs for refined storage.
Size: 28×23.5×12cm
Style: 1BZ677

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Photos M24996 Screen Print (Surfing) This Christopher Medium Backpack uses Monogram Surfin' canvas inspired by Pharrell Williams, interpreting the inspiration of a rucksack. Surfboards and floral elements construct an intricate overlapping pattern, highlighting a retro atmosphere with vibrant tones. The close-fitting silhouette includes ample space, with compartments and side pockets. Dimensions: 38x44x12.5cm

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
Product Info
This Dior Caro Backpack is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Collection, showcasing a fashionable and elegant style. Crafted from black sheepskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting for a touch of class. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo. Inside, there is a spacious drawstring main compartment, and two small flap pockets for various daily essentials. The medium size comes with gold-finish handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for added comfort.
Main: Sheepskin, Lining: Cowhide
Front features CD logo flap and drawstring closure
Dimensions: 23×26.7×12.5cm
Style No.: 6301

specs.rawTitle:
Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth

items.name_en: 💖 Comes with a complete set of original green box packaging 💖 [New] Ophidia Series Mini Backpack. The Ophidia series blends Gucci's traditional heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This backpack is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, featuring a classic webbing design that infuses the brand's essence. An adjustable shoulder strap adds a modern touch. Beige and white GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, brown cotton-linen lining, double G handles. Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.

items.name_cn:
Dior Caro 2025 Pre-Fall Backpack Beige Medium
Sheepskin material, feels fine and soft
Low-key black and gold color scheme makes it hard to go out of style!
Large woven pattern stitching elevates the style, flap decorated with vintage gold-finish metal CD logo, inside is a drawstring main compartment, small flap pocket for daily essentials, paired with gold-finish handles and adjustable shoulder strap for added comfort.
Size: 23x27x12.5cm
